# JSClassRef

**Type Alias**

A JavaScript class.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias JSClassRef = OpaquePointer
```

## Discussion

Use this type with [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSObjectMake(_:_:_:)] to construct objects with custom behavior.

## JavaScriptCore Engine Interface

- **JSContextGroupRef**: A group that associates JavaScript contexts with one another.
- **JSContextRef**: A JavaScript execution context.
- **JSGlobalContextRef**: A global JavaScript execution context.
- **JSStringRef**: A UTF-16 character buffer.

items.description: A group that associates JavaScript contexts with one another.
